items.title: Online rooms live
items.description: Players can join the same Firebase room by invite code.

items.title: Guest bots
items.description: Guest seats now auto-play from the host browser.

items.title: Poker test command
items.description: Added a dedicated npm test suite for deck rules, hand evaluation, bot decisions, and betting flow regressions.

items.title: All-in turn flow
items.description: Betting rounds now handle all-in players correctly, keep action on players who still need to respond, and use accurate all-in action text.

items.title: Blind rotation
items.description: Dealer, small blind, and big blind now move to the next eligible seat when a new hand starts.

items.title: Hidden cards
items.description: Fold-ended hands keep hole cards private by default, with an end-of-hand option to reveal your own cards to the table.
